name: Ferplast Natural Collar C20/43
description: The FERPLAST Natural Leather Dog Collar combines simplicity, elegance, and functionality. Available in natural beige or black , this collar is crafted from high-quality leather with strong stitching and a refined metal buckle, ensuring durability and a secure fit. With eight different sizes , it adapts perfectly to dogs of all breeds and sizes, making it an ideal choice for both everyday walks and training sessions. The collar’s surface features multiple holes for easy adjustment, providing comfort for your dog while maintaining style and reliability. Complete your set with matching leads and training leads from the Natural range for a coordinated, premium look. Key Features & Benefits Premium Leather Material – Durable, soft, and long-lasting. Refined Design & Finishes – Simple yet elegant lines with strong seamings and a metal buckle. Two Color Options – Natural beige for a neutral look or black for a more striking appearance. Eight Sizes Available – Perfect for dogs of all sizes, from small to large breeds. Easy to Adjust – Multiple holes for a secure and comfortable fit. Compatible Accessories – Complete your set with Natural range leads and training leads. Ideal For Dog owners looking for a durable, stylish, and adjustable leather collar that combines elegance with practicality.       .
